'''''Op Mus''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that had been assigned to carried food during and after the evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

However, while in transit it malfunctioned and was stranded in deep space. After the loss of the ''[[Dobll]]'' freighters, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] could not afford the loss of yet more supplies. So the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] ''[[Jaamn]]'' was sent to repair the freighter. [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], including [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], was sent to oversee the repair process and protect it from encroaching [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
